title: Convenient things for Peaceful game
description:
It's made for users that plays in peaceful difficulty!
(and me)
body:
- Do you wanna just build houses peacefully? - Are you new to minecraft and afraid of monsters? - Don't you wanna waste your diamonds to swords? Then, this mod would be helpful for you! **Convenient things for Peaceful game** ## features: **Make sting from feather or wool.
** **Make ender pearl with four diamonds and a lapis.
** **Make blaze stick with a red dye, and a yellow one, and a stick.
** **Make bone from pork.
** **Rot Beef to make rotten flesh.
** **Make gunpower with a cobblestone and two coals.
**
